metadata.description: バランス — a Claude Code plugin marketplace

plugins.name: baransu
plugins.description: バランス — governance skills that balance thinking and execution. Ships /think (deliberate before building), /review (independent multi-perspective re-verification), /analyze (goal-anchored spec builder), /dev (gate-enforced TDD executor), /write (bilingual zh/en copywriting), /execute (TDAID orchestration for /analyze specs), /ship (session cleanup), /hunt (bug diagnosis), /read (offline Markdown capture), /design (UI/UX spec generator), /learn (research digest pipeline), plus the cron-driven self-healing harness — /grade (5-dim rubric scoring), /triage (cluster + investigator + 5-black auto-fix), and /bridge (head-to-head replay with Δ-gate).
